Alexis Vega.summary: Alexis Vega is a Mexico left winger from Toluca who gives the national team direct dribbling, set-piece quality, and final-third invention.
Alexis Vega.note: Mexico's left-side creator, dangerous when he can isolate, whip restarts, or turn a loose touch into a shot.
Alexis Vega.noteZh: 亚历克西斯·维加是墨西哥左路创造者，在获得单挑、主罚定位球或把松散触球转成射门时很有威胁。

Alvaro Fidalgo.note: Mexico's Spanish-born midfield metronome, helping them pass through pressure and keep attacks connected.
Alvaro Fidalgo.noteZh: 阿尔瓦罗·菲达尔戈是墨西哥西班牙出生的中场节拍器，能帮助球队穿过压力并保持进攻连接。

Armando Gonzalez.note: Mexico's emerging No. 9, giving them box movement, near-post runs, and a younger finishing profile behind the veterans.
Armando Gonzalez.noteZh: 阿曼多·冈萨雷斯是墨西哥新兴九号位，能提供禁区跑动、前点冲刺，以及老将身后的年轻终结选择。

Brian Gutierrez.note: Mexico's between-lines option, useful for quick turns, small-space passing, and finding runners before blocks settle.
Brian Gutierrez.noteZh: 布赖恩·古铁雷斯是墨西哥线间选择，能快速转身、小范围传球，并在防线站稳前找到跑动队友。

Carlos Acevedo.note: Mexico's goalkeeper depth, giving them shot-stopping cover and longer distribution if they need to play over pressure.
Carlos Acevedo.noteZh: 卡洛斯·阿塞韦多是墨西哥门将深度，能提供扑救保障，并在需要越过压力时送出长传。

Cesar Huerta.note: Mexico's direct left winger, stretching defensive lines with carries, cut-inside shots, and fearless one-on-ones.
Cesar Huerta.noteZh: 塞萨尔·韦尔塔是墨西哥直接型左边锋，能用带球、内切射门和无畏单挑拉扯防线。

Cesar Montes.note: Mexico's defensive tower, important for aerial clearances, set-piece threat, and organizing the centre-backs.
Cesar Montes.noteZh: 塞萨尔·蒙特斯是墨西哥防线高塔，对空中解围、定位球威胁和中卫组织都很重要。

Edson Alvarez.note: Mexico's midfield anchor, slowing counters, protecting the back line, and dropping into defense when needed.
Edson Alvarez.noteZh: 埃德松·阿尔瓦雷斯是墨西哥中场锚点，能拖慢反击、保护防线，并在需要时回撤到后防。

Erik Lira.note: Mexico's ball-winning midfielder, useful for closing central gaps and moving possession on without overcomplicating it.
Erik Lira.noteZh: 埃里克·利拉是墨西哥抢球型中场，能封住中路空当，并用简洁方式转移球权。

Gilberto Mora.summary: Gilberto Mora is a Mexico attacking midfielder from Club Tijuana who adds teenage creativity, quick feet, and central chance creation.
Gilberto Mora.note: Mexico's teenage creative wildcard, able to receive in tight spaces and slip a final pass before defenders react.
Gilberto Mora.noteZh: 希尔贝托·莫拉是墨西哥年轻创造变数，能在狭小空间接球，并在后卫反应前送出最后一传。

Guillermo Martinez.note: Mexico's physical striker option, useful for aerial duels, holding up direct balls, and attacking crosses late.
Guillermo Martinez.noteZh: 吉列尔莫·马丁内斯是墨西哥身体型中锋选择，能争顶、背身拿住直传，并在后段冲击传中。

Guillermo Ochoa.note: Mexico's veteran goalkeeper icon, bringing reflex saves, tournament calm, and authority in high-pressure moments.
Guillermo Ochoa.noteZh: 吉列尔莫·奥乔亚是墨西哥标志性老将门将，能带来反应扑救、大赛冷静和高压时刻的权威感。

Israel Reyes.note: Mexico's versatile defender, able to cover centre-back, right-back, or midfield while keeping duels competitive.
Israel Reyes.noteZh: 以色列·雷耶斯是墨西哥多面防守者，能覆盖中卫、右后卫或中场，并保持对抗强度。

Jesus Gallardo.note: Mexico's veteran left-side outlet, giving them width, recovery runs, and steady service from deeper zones.
Jesus Gallardo.noteZh: 赫苏斯·加利亚多是墨西哥老练的左路出口，能提供宽度、回追跑动和来自深处的稳定传球。

Johan Vasquez.summary: Johan Vásquez is a Mexico centre-back from Genoa who gives the national team left-footed defending, aerial power, and Serie A-tested duels.
Johan Vasquez.note: Mexico's left-footed centre-back, giving them aerial power, recovery defending, and confidence in physical duels.
Johan Vasquez.noteZh: 约翰·巴斯克斯是墨西哥左脚中卫，能提供空中力量、回追防守和身体对抗中的信心。

Jorge Sanchez.summary: Jorge Sánchez is a Mexico right-back from PAOK who adds wide defending, overlap timing, and national-team experience.
Jorge Sanchez.note: Mexico's experienced right-back, useful for wide recovery, overlaps, and surviving one-on-one defensive spells.
Jorge Sanchez.noteZh: 豪尔赫·桑切斯是墨西哥经验型右后卫，能完成边路回追、套边，并撑过一对一防守阶段。

Julian Quinones.note: Mexico's powerful forward runner, attacking channels, finishing through contact, and giving the front line vertical force.
Julian Quinones.noteZh: 胡利安·基尼奥内斯是墨西哥强力前场跑动点，能冲击通道、对抗中终结，并给锋线带来纵向力量。

Luis Chavez.note: Mexico's left-footed launcher, valuable for diagonal passing, long-range shots, and dead-ball delivery.
Luis Chavez.noteZh: 路易斯·查韦斯是墨西哥左脚发射器，斜传、远射和定位球传球都很有价值。

Luis Romo.note: Mexico's hybrid midfielder, able to cover defensive gaps, step into duels, and arrive late around the box.
Luis Romo.noteZh: 路易斯·罗莫是墨西哥混合型中场，能补防空当、进入对抗，并后插上到禁区周围。

Mateo Chavez.note: Mexico's young left-back, giving them recovery speed, forward support, and a fresher flank profile.
Mateo Chavez.noteZh: 马特奥·查韦斯是墨西哥年轻左后卫，能提供回追速度、前插支援和更有活力的边路选择。

Obed Vargas.note: Mexico's mobile young midfielder, helping them escape pressure and cover ground on both sides of the ball.
Obed Vargas.noteZh: 奥贝德·巴尔加斯是墨西哥机动型年轻中场，能帮助球队摆脱压力，并在攻守两端覆盖空间。

Orbelin Pineda.note: Mexico's creative connector, combining quickly between lines and arriving late when the box opens.
Orbelin Pineda.noteZh: 奥尔贝林·皮内达是墨西哥创造型连接点，能在线间快速配合，并在禁区打开时后插上。

Raul Jimenez.note: Mexico's veteran striker reference, using hold-up craft, penalty-box timing, and experience to steady the front line.
Raul Jimenez.noteZh: 劳尔·希门尼斯是墨西哥老将锋线支点，能用背身技术、禁区时机和经验稳住前场。

Raul Rangel.summary: Raúl Rangel is a Mexico goalkeeper from Guadalajara who gives the national team shot-stopping depth, reflex saves, and modern distribution.
Raul Rangel.note: Mexico's rising goalkeeper option, giving them reflex saves, cleaner distribution, and pressure on the veteran hierarchy.
Raul Rangel.noteZh: 劳尔·兰赫尔是墨西哥上升中的门将选择，能提供反应扑救、更干净的出球，并给老将层级带来竞争。

Roberto Alvarado.note: Mexico's crafty wide creator, cutting inside onto his left foot while still doing the defensive pressing work.
Roberto Alvarado.noteZh: 罗伯托·阿尔瓦拉多是墨西哥灵巧边路创造者，能内切到左脚处理，同时完成防守压迫工作。

Santiago Gimenez.note: Mexico's prime-age No. 9, built for penalty-box movement, first-time finishes, and carrying the main scoring burden.
Santiago Gimenez.noteZh: 圣地亚哥·希门尼斯是墨西哥黄金年龄九号位，擅长禁区跑动、第一时间射门，并承担主要进球责任。
